Local, Qualified, Trusted

P&T Tractors has been part of the Foxton community for years. We live here, work here, and understand what local farmers need.

Our Story

Foxton's Tractor Specialists

P&T Tractors has been part of the Foxton community for years. We're locally owned and operated — we live here, work here, and understand what local farmers need from a tractor repair business.

We have 7 fully qualified, factory-trained technicians — 5 tractor specialists and 2 machinery specialists. Every one of them has the training and experience to work on John Deere equipment to manufacturer standards.

Competitive prices. Quality repairs. And we'll be straight with you about what needs doing and what it'll cost. That's how we've built our reputation in Foxton.

The Team

John Deere Specialist

Factory Trained

All 7 technicians are fully qualified and factory trained for tractor and machinery repair.

Need a Tractor Sorted?

Call us, send an enquiry, or come in to 65 Johnston St, Foxton.
